search_company_data.student_note: Turn ON to enable RAG: company files are searched and sent to the model. Turn OFF and no company_data is used.

calculator.student_note: Useful for prices, discounts, measurements, simple budgets, and technical calculations.

current_datetime.student_note: Useful when the answer depends on today's date or time.

create_support_ticket.student_note: Demo tool. Turn ON if your bot should simulate escalation to a human.
